data.title: AI Reduces Startup Costs, Raising Questions About Competitive Advantages
data.description:
According to Foresight News, the advent of AI technologies like ChatGPT has significantly reduced the costs associated with software development and business expansion. Qiao Wang, founder of Alliance DAO, shared his experience of using ChatGPT as a programming assistant three years ago, which drastically cut down the time required for tasks. Since then, AI tools have been increasingly adopted by tech founders, boosting productivity by 1.5 to 4 times.

Wang observed that the cost of software development is nearing zero, and other business functions such as marketing, sales, and customer service are also seeing reduced costs. While large companies are already experiencing these benefits, startups that have not yet achieved product-market fit are less affected. However, those that have found their market fit are scaling rapidly with AI assistance.

This shift implies that startups can now grow significantly with minimal funding and personnel. Wang predicts the emergence of unicorn companies founded by a few co-founders with as little as $500,000. Many startups have already achieved substantial revenue with small teams and minimal funding.

Despite these advancements, the question arises: where do startups find their competitive edge? Wang suggests several potential advantages:

1. Proprietary Data: Exclusive customer data or hard-to-access public datasets can provide a defensive edge.

2. Network Effects: While software can be replicated, acquiring a customer base like Facebook or Nasdaq is challenging.

3. Deep Integration: Software deeply integrated into workflows has high switching costs.

4. Ecosystem Lock-In: Platforms with strong developer ecosystems and third-party integrations have high user retention.

5. Regulatory Barriers: AI cannot secure the licenses and relationships needed in highly regulated industries like finance and healthcare.

6. Trust and Brand: Consumers and businesses continue to rely on established brands for critical decisions.

7. Real-World Constraints: Physical infrastructure, robotics, and supply chains present limitations AI cannot bypass.

8. Deep User Insights: While AI can commercialize good ideas, true user understanding requires direct interaction.

For startups yet to find product-market fit, the primary goal remains achieving this fit. However, considering defensive strategies post-fit is more crucial than ever.

data.title: DeepSeek App has been downloaded over 100 million times in one month since its launch
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The latest data obtained from the data analysis platform QuestMobile shows that from its launch to February 9, the cumulative downloads of DeepSeekApp have exceeded 110 million times, and the weekly active user scale has reached nearly 97 million. More importantly, DeepSeek has invested almost nothing in marketing. Under the strong momentum of DeepSeek, Kimi and Doubao, which once stood out, seem to be becoming "supporting roles." Kimi is estimated to have accumulated a total of 900 million yuan in traffic in the past year, but the user growth effect is not good. (Every Jing)

data.title: Bithumb: Services will be suspended for about 6 hours on February 24 to upgrade internal systems
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Bithumb announced that it will carry out internal system upgrades from 1:00 to 7:00 (a total of 6 hours) on Monday, February 24, 2025. At that time, all platform-related services (Bithumb APP/mobile webpage/PC/API) will be suspended, and the service maintenance time may end early or be delayed. This operation is carried out in accordance with Article 17, Item 1, Paragraph 1 of the Enforcement Order of the Korean Virtual Asset User Protection Act.
After the service inspection is completed, if there is an abnormal difference between the prices of domestic and foreign exchanges and Bithumb pending orders, the pending orders may be cancelled to protect the customers of pending orders. Please try to cancel the buy/sell pending orders before the service inspection.
The deposited won or virtual assets will be automatically reflected in the account after the inspection is completed.
The unfinished virtual assets will be automatically processed for withdrawal after the inspection is completed.
Due to internal system operations, there may be restrictions on the content of consultation during chat consultation.

data.title: Hong Kong Securities Industry Anticipates Growth in Virtual Assets
data.description:
According to PANews, a survey by the Hong Kong Securities Association reveals that despite half of the respondents reporting losses last year, 7% and 21% anticipate significant and moderate business expansion, respectively, this year. The survey identifies 'AI financial applications,' 'stablecoins and virtual assets,' and 'securities market reform' as the top three drivers of Hong Kong's financial development, with 28% favoring stablecoins and virtual assets.

Additionally, the survey highlights that the most promising financial themes for investment in 2025 include virtual assets, overseas investor immigration plans, family offices, and green finance, with virtual assets leading at 36%. Li Yingyu, Vice Chairman of the Hong Kong Securities Association, noted that as local brokers develop in the emerging virtual asset industry, many mainland investors are interested in acquiring licenses to operate in Hong Kong. There has also been an increase in inquiries from brokers about purchasing licenses recently.

data.title: The Hong Kong securities industry believes that "stablecoins and virtual assets" have become the engine of Hong Kong's financial development, with a proportion of up to 28%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - A survey by the Hong Kong Securities Association shows that although half of the industry respondents said they recorded losses last year, 7% and 21% believe that their business will expand significantly and moderately this year. The survey shows that the securities industry believes that "financial applications of artificial intelligence", "stablecoins and virtual assets", and "securities market reforms" will become the three major engines of Hong Kong's financial development, of which "stablecoins and virtual assets" account for as much as 28%. In addition, the survey also found that the Hong Kong securities industry believes that the most worthy financial themes for investment and development in 2025 include virtual assets, investor overseas immigration plans, family offices, green finance, etc., among which virtual assets account for the highest proportion, reaching 36%. Li Yingyu, vice chairman of the Hong Kong Securities Association, said that with the development of the emerging industry of virtual assets of local securities firms, many mainland capitals are interested in expanding their business in Hong Kong by buying licenses. The number of people who have consulted securities firms about purchasing licenses has also increased recently. (Ta Kung Pao)

data.title: Messari: BounceBit TVL reaches $566 million, expected to lead the development of CeDeFi track
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Messari’s X platform, a detailed report on BounceBit’s CeDeFi model was issued, which mentioned that the project deeply integrates CeFi and DeFi, providing multiple solutions for institutional income, Bitcoin re-pledge, and real-world asset (RWA) integration. The project’s TVL has now reached US$566 million, and it will strategically shift to US dollar-denominated income products in 2025.
In addition, according to CCData, by the end of 2024, the spot and derivatives trading volume of centralized exchanges (CEXs) reached a record high of US$11.3 trillion per year.

data.title: Litecoin Daily Transactions Surge Amid ETF Developments
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, daily transactions on the Litecoin network have reached $9.6 billion as exchange-traded fund (ETF) issuers move to list their proposed Litecoin ETFs in the United States. This surge in activity has coincided with a significant increase in Litecoin's market capitalization, which rose by 46% from February 2 to February 19, as reported by Santiment on February 21. The report attributes this growth to a strong rise in network utility, with the network processing $9.6 billion in daily transaction volume over the past week.

In late August, Litecoin's daily transaction volume was approximately $2.8 billion, marking a 243% increase over five months. Additionally, Litecoin prices have doubled since early November, surpassing the broader crypto market's gains of 42% during the same period. This growth is partly driven by anticipation surrounding a potential Litecoin ETF, coming 13 months after the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) approved the first Bitcoin ETFs.

The SEC recently acknowledged a rule change to list the CoinShares spot Litecoin ETF on the Nasdaq on February 19. Furthermore, a listing for Canary Capital's Litecoin ETF appeared on the Depository Trust and Clearing Corporation (DTCC) system under the ticker LTCC on February 20. The DTCC plays a crucial role in global financial markets, processing trillions of dollars in securities transactions daily. The Litecoin Foundation noted that this listing is a key preparatory step for the potential launch of the fund.

Bloomberg ETF analyst Eric Balchunas cautioned that while the listing indicates preparations are underway, it does not guarantee approval or readiness for trading. However, analysts still estimate a 90% chance of approval this year. In response to the DTCC listing, Litecoin prices spiked by approximately 8.5%, rising from an intraday low of $127 to $138 before a slight pullback on February 21. Over the past two weeks, Litecoin has risen nearly 30%, outperforming Bitcoin, which has remained relatively stable since falling back into five figures in early February.

data.title: DeepSeek: Five code libraries will be open sourced next week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: DeepSeek officially announced that in the next week, it will gradually source 5 code bases, unlock new content every day, and further share new progress. DeepSeek introduced that the current online service modules have been tested and deployed fully and can be put into production environment. The company defines itself as a small company and also stated that every sharing will become a powerful potential energy to accelerate the journey of industry development. It also said that there is no high ivory tower in this field, only the pure garage entrepreneurial spirit and the innovation power built by the community. (Jinshi)

data.title: Litecoin ETF Approval Probability Reaches 85% On Polymarket
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, as of February 21, data from the official website indicates that the probability of a Litecoin ETF being approved this year is currently reported at 85% on Polymarket.

CoinGecko data shows that Litecoin's market capitalization is currently valued at $10.18 billion, ranking it 18th among cryptocurrencies, with a 24-hour increase of 2.4%.

BlockBeats previously reported that at 7 a.m. on February 21, the Canary Litecoin Spot ETF was listed on the DTCC website under the code LTCC, with the creation/redemption section marked as D. Although this listing does not imply any regulatory approval or definitive outcome of the approval process, being listed on the DTCC website is considered a standard procedure for launching a new ETF.

data.title: Musk's X-platform avatar changed, the background includes the words "The Doge Father"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Musk changed his X profile picture to a picture of a man holding a "golden chainsaw". It is understood that the tool was donated by Argentine President Milley. The words on the back are "The Doge Father".
